generated_oml:
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder mounted on the motor of the first axis of the MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder behind the gearbox of the first axis of the MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SecondaryPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance Sinumerik840DControllerSensors : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl controller sensors providing position, velocity, acceleration, and motor current measurements for the first axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorVelocityDataTransmitted, MotorAccelerationDataTransmitted, SystemPositionDataTransmitted, SystemVelocityDataTransmitted, SystemAccelerationDataTransmitted, MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor for the first axis of the MABI MAX 100 industrial robot with input current I_M and output torque τ_M"
]

instance Gearwheel : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Gearwheel component of the first axis of the MABI MAX 100 industrial robot with torque τ_G"
]

instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox for the first axis of the MABI MAX 100 industrial robot with torque τ_out"
]

instance MotorPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance MotorVelocityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Sinumerik840DControllerSensors
]

instance MotorAccelerationDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Sinumerik840DControllerSensors
]

instance SecondaryPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoder
]

instance SecondaryVelocityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Sinumerik840DControllerSensors
]

instance SecondaryAccelerationDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Sinumerik840DControllerSensors
]

instance SystemPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Sinumerik840DControllerSensors
]

instance SystemVelocityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Sinumerik840DControllerSensors
]

instance SystemAccelerationDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Sinumerik840DControllerSensors
]

instance MotorCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Sinumerik840DControllerSensors
]

instance MeasuredCurrent : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured current (I_M) for the permanent magnet synchronous motor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink, AssetAdministrationShells, MQTT, Sinumerik840DSLCNCController
]

instance MeasuredMotorPosition : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured motor output position (r_M) for the first axis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink, AssetAdministrationShells, MQTT, Sinumerik840DSLCNCController
]

instance MeasuredGearwheelPosition : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured gearwheel output position (r_G) for the first axis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SecondaryPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink, AssetAdministrationShells, MQTT, Sinumerik840DSLCNCController
]

instance MeasuredSystemPosition : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured system output position (r_out) for the first axis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SystemPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink, AssetAdministrationShells, MQTT, Sinumerik840DSLCNCController
]

instance SimulatedMotorPosition : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated motor output position (r_M_hat) with metadata for traceability"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink, AssetAdministrationShells, MQTT, DashboardVisualizationTool
]

instance SimulatedGearwheelPosition : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated gearwheel output position (r_G_hat) with metadata for traceability"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SecondaryPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink, AssetAdministrationShells, MQTT, DashboardVisualizationTool
]

instance SimulatedSystemPosition : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated system output position (r_out_hat) with metadata for traceability"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SystemPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink, AssetAdministrationShells, MQTT, DashboardVisualizationTool
]

instance SysMLStructuralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML structural models including Block Definition Diagram and Internal Block Diagram for robot axis components"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelingTool
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Coulomb-Viscous friction model for the first axis of the MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Stribeck friction model for the first axis of the MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dahl friction model for the first axis of the MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "LuGre friction model for the first axis of the MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink for simulation models of friction"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, MotionAccuracyEnhancementService, FrictionDataVisualizationService
]

instance SysMLModelingTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML for structural modeling of the robot axis"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance AssetAdministrationShells : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells for digital twin asset management"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, MotionAccuracyEnhancementService, FrictionDataVisualizationService
]

instance MQTT : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT for real-time data streaming from physical to virtual"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, MotionAccuracyEnhancementService, FrictionDataVisualizationService
]

instance Sinumerik840DSLCNCController : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller for data acquisition"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, MotionAccuracyEnhancementService, FrictionDataVisualizationService
]

instance DashboardVisualizationTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization tools for friction data"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionDataVisualizationService
]

instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous multi-physics-aware identification of joint friction using white-box and black-box models"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionLossInsight, ControlAlgorithmAdjustmentAction
]

instance MotionAccuracyEnhancementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Motion accuracy enhancement through friction model refinement"
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlAlgorithmAdjustmentAction
]

instance FrictionDataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integrated visualization of friction data in a unified dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionLossInsight
]

instance FrictionLossInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Friction loss identification in robot joints"
]

instance ControlAlgorithmAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Decision making for control algorithm adjustments to improve motion accuracy based on refined friction models"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance MABIMAX100Axis1 : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "The first axis of the MABI MAX 100 industrial robot used for machining applications with a maximum working range of [-90°, 90°] and maximum speed of 75°/s"
    base:contains PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, Gearwheel, CycloidalGearbox, MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder, Sinumerik840DControllerSensors
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization via MQTT for live data processing; continuous friction model updates during robot operation with no specified fixed intervals."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Integration of SysML structural model, Simulink simulation models, MQTT data streams, processing components for friction identification, and unified dashboard visualization; purpose-driven for friction analysis in the robot's first axis."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational phase (as operated) for real-time friction model refinement during robot operation, with no focus on design or manufacturing stages."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validation through comparison of simulated vs. measured data to identify friction deviations; no explicit verification methods detailed in the document."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time data streaming from physical sensors to the digital shadow."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS) for Industry 4.0 standards; SysML for model-based systems engineering; Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl controller standards for CNC operations."
]
